basics.name: Hau Tran
basics.label: Web Developer
basics.summary: Hey, I am Hau Tran, a web developer with passion for building digital services/stuff. I specialize in creating seamless products from concept to completion, take great care on exceptional user experiences and clean, efficient code. Outside of programming, I enjoy exploring art and reading the Bible.

experimentalApps.name: Tiny
experimentalApps.summary: A mobile social networking app where share ideas, ask questions, post random thoughts, find your people and more
experimentalApps.technologies: React Native, Expo, TypeScript, Supabase, Zustand, Nativewind, PostgreSQL, TanStack Query

experimentalApps.name: Arc
experimentalApps.summary: An e-commerce marketplace web application where people come together to make, sell, buy, and collect unique items
experimentalApps.technologies: TypeScript, TanStack Query, Nuxt.js, Pinia, Tailwind CSS, Express.js, MongoDB

experimentalApps.name: Meepo
experimentalApps.summary: A free social networking site where people converse with each other in short messages
experimentalApps.technologies: TypeScript, TanStack Query, Vue, Tailwind CSS, Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, Redis

experimentalApps.name: Camille
experimentalApps.summary: A note-taking web application where you can think, write, and plan
experimentalApps.technologies: Next.js, TypeScript, Tanstack Query, Tailwind CSS, Zustand, MySQL, Stripe

devTools.name: agent-skills
devTools.summary: A personal collection of reusable, agent-agnostic skills for AI coding assistants such as Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf.
devTools.technologies: Markdown, SKILL.md, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor

devTools.name: eslint-config
devTools.summary: My ESLint config presets for TypeScript, React, Vue and more.
devTools.technologies: TypeScript, ESLint, pnpm, React, Vue, Tailwind CSS, Stylistic

devTools.name: plslog
devTools.summary: A browser-first logging library with structured logging, namespaces, and environment-aware behavior.

devTools.name: create-react-template
devTools.summary: A CLI scaffolding tool for generating production-ready TanStack Start and React 19 applications with Feature-Sliced Design architecture.
devTools.technologies: TypeScript, React 19, TanStack Start, TanStack Router, Tailwind CSS, Vitest

devTools.name: dotfiles
devTools.summary: My shell configuration, aliases, and workflow tooling for a faster command-line experience.

highlights: Developed Octokit, a no-code web platform for creating branded mini-games and AR filters for marketing campaigns and events.
Refactored a large front-end codebase and reorganized the project structure to improve maintainability, scalability, and team productivity.
Integrated AI-powered asset editing and generation, allowing users to transform and create game assets in-editor
Develop user-facing features and reusable code, ensuring UI/UX designs are feasible and optimized for performance and scalability.
Collaborate with BAs, POs, designers, and back-end developers to align on requirements and implementation.
Write unit tests for quality assurance.
Maintain, debug, and support project releases in production.
